

## 3.6.7 / 2016-02-23
- Release v3.6.7 / npm@v3.6.7
- update license year
- update semver to `^3.6.7`
- add support for scoped shorthands e.g. `@user/package@~3.6.7` (PR [#2](https://github.com/tunnckoCore/parse-semver/pull/2 "Support scoped packages"))
